CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW view_table ENGINE = MergeTree() AS SELECT id, name FROM test_table;
SELECT * FROM another_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table);
CREATE TABLE temporary_table (id UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE user_data (user_id UInt32, user_name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY user_id;
CREATE TABLE summary_table AS SELECT user_id, count(*) AS login_count FROM user_logs GROUP BY user_id;
CREATE DICTIONARY user_dictionary (id UInt32 DEFAULT 0, name String DEFAULT '') PRIMARY KEY id;
CREATE TABLE complex_view AS SELECT a.id, b.value FROM another_table AS a JOIN user_data AS b ON a.id = b.user_id;
